summary: ANDROID ⛔ CLOUD ☁️ Policy locked on phone but with wrong value
scenario: Locked policy from Poly Lens Cloud shows incorrect displayed value on Poly Studio Mobile app for Voyager Free 20 Sensors & Presence settings
description_clean: When a policy is locked via Poly Lens Cloud for a connected Poly Voyager Free 20 device, the settings on the Poly Studio Mobile Android app show as locked (cannot be changed), but the displayed value is incorrect — it shows the value previously selected on the phone instead of the value set on the cloud. Expected behavior: The Sensors & Presence category should be available with settings that can be locked to a specific value, and the policy should be applied correctly.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a Poly Voyager Free 20 device.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
5. Using Poly Lens Cloud, create or apply a policy that locks the Sensors & Presence settings to a specific value.
6. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and observe the Sensors & Presence settings on the Audio Settings screen.
7. Attempt to change the locked setting value.
expected: The Sensors & Presence settings should display the value set by the cloud policy, and the setting should be locked (grayed out / non-interactive).
actual: The Sensors & Presence settings display the value previously selected on the phone (not the cloud policy value), though the setting is shown as locked and cannot be changed.
